REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (810 Potrero Avenue, San Francisco Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Stephen Mingle.

The sale was confirmed at $740,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
